testcase.name: ProcessInstanceOperations > should render operations for active instance with incident
ProcessInstanceOperations > should render operations for active instance without incident
ProcessInstanceOperations > should render delete operation for terminated instance
ProcessInstanceOperations > should hide operations when modification mode is enabled
ProcessInstanceOperations > should show notification on cancel error
ProcessInstanceOperations > should show notification on resolve incident error
ProcessInstanceOperations > should show notification on resolve incident permission error
ProcessInstanceOperations > should show notification on delete operation error
InstanceHeader > should render process instance data
InstanceHeader > should render "View All" link for call activity process
InstanceHeader > should navigate to Instances Page and expand Filters Panel on "View All" click
InstanceHeader > should render parent Process Instance Key
InstanceHeader > should show spinner when instance has active operations
InstanceHeader > should not show spinner when instance has no active operations
InstanceHeader > should show operation buttons for running process instance when user has permission
InstanceHeader > should show operation buttons for finished process instance when user has permission
InstanceHeader > should redirect and show notification when "Delete Instance" is clicked
InstanceHeader > should show spinner on process instance cancellation
InstanceHeader > should render multi tenancy column and include tenant in version link
testcase.system-err:
[MSW] Error: intercepted a request without a matching request handler:
• GET /api/process-instances/2251799813685294
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled request, please create a request handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/http/intercepting-requests
